env.TOOL_FIND_DESCRIPTION: Semantic search over this repository's persistent project memory: decisions, operator feedback, gotchas and milestones from past sessions. Use proactively at the start of any non-trivial task, and before re-deriving anything a past session may have settled. Phrase the query as a natural-language question.
env.TOOL_STORE_DESCRIPTION: Persist a memory for future sessions: a non-trivial decision, operator feedback or correction, a hard-won gotcha, or milestone state. Store proactively when you learn something a future session needs - do not wait to be asked. Write 1-3 self-contained sentences, present tense, absolute dates; metadata: {"type": "project|feedback|user|reference", "topic": "<kebab-case>"}.
